Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more
Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more

      Brand Samsung
      Model Name Galaxy Tab S11

      Display Resolution Maximum 2560 x 1600 Pixels

      About this item

      • BRILLIANCE ON DISPLAY: A large 11” Dynamic AMOLED 2X display¹ with Vision Booster provides clear text and rich colors for long session comfort whether you’re reading docs and slides or creating designs
      • MULTITASKING CAPABILITY: This fast tablet with 12GB RAM quickly opens and switches between the wide range of Android apps without slowdowns for snappier multitasking and smoother workflow
      • SUMMARIZE IN A SNAP: Quickly capture ideas with the pen-on-paper precision of the included Galaxy Tab S Pen and let Note Assist² with Galaxy AI³ keep them tidy and organized during meetings and lectures
      • BRING YOUR IDEAS TO LIFE: Use the S Pen with Drawing Assist⁴ to turn your product team’s rough sketches into shareable mock-ups or note drawings into a sleek storyboards
      • EXPANDABLE STORAGE: The microSD card allows you to use your tablet for keeping more files, movies or music to enjoy offline without running out of space. Ideal for creators wanting flexible storage
      • WORK AND PLAY FEARLESSLY: This 5.5mm thin, durable tablet with an IP68 rating⁵ makes it easy to carry with the peace of mind that it’s protected from spills, rain and dust when you’re on the go
      • SHOW YOUR VIEW, GET INSTANT INSIGHTS: Gemini Live facilitates quicker understanding and decision making by analyzing what’s on the screen or shared via camera, turning your tablet into your daily command center
      • WHY GALAXY TAB S11: Flagship screen, smooth multitasking, Note Assist, Drawing Assist, S Pen, microSD storage and an IP68 rating² for Samsung owners who want one powerful tablet for work and entertainment
      › See more product details

      Product Description

      The Galaxy Tab S11 is your everyday productivity and entertainment Wi-Fi tablet. The 11"" Dynamic AMOLED 2X display¹ of this large-screen Samsung tablet with crisp text and color makes even the longest work or steaming session comfortable. Built for smooth multitasking, the 3nm MediaTek processor means you can quickly switch between tasks without annoying slowdowns. Adding to this, the 5.5mm thin design means it’s easy to carry as a main screen for school, work and home.

      To make sure it gets there and back again, this Samsung Tab is built real-life ready with IP68-rated⁵ durability and able to handle spills, rain and dust. Together with the included S Pen, the Galaxy AI³ productivity and creativity tools will redefine the way you work and play. Note Assist² helps keep notes tidy by summarizing and formatting them so they’re easier to find and review later, while Drawing Assist⁴ helps turn rough sketches into more polished-looking concepts faster. Plus, with Gemini Live you’ve got streamlined assistance that allows you to share your view and get instant insights based on what’s on your tablet screen.

      ¹Measured diagonally, the Galaxy Tab S11 screen size is 11"" in the full rectangle and 10.9"" accounting for the rounded corners. Actual viewable area is less due to the rounded corners.

      ²For text in Samsung Notes only (200 – 4,000 characters); requires Samsung account login and internet connection.

      ³Galaxy AI basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced AI features and all third- party AI features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy AI basic features are listed under ""Advanced intelligence"" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.)

      ⁴Drawing Assist feature requires a network connection and Samsung account login. A visible watermark is overlaid on the image output upon saving in order to indicate that the image is generated by AI. The accuracy and reliability of the generated output is not guaranteed.

      ⁵Consistent with IP68 rating, water resistant in up to 5 feet of water for up to 30 minutes. Rinse residue / dry after wet.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers praise the tablet's quality, performance, and sharp display, with one highlighting its suitability for media consumption. The device is fast and has great sound quality. Battery life receives mixed feedback - while some find it excellent, others report charging issues. Value for money opinions are divided between those who find it worth the price and those who consider it overpriced.
